# -debug prints structured logs to stderr.
exec sflit -source big.go -sink small.go -regex '^Filter' -debug
stderr 'msg="parsed source"'
stderr 'msg="selected declarations"'
stderr 'msg="validation passed"'
stderr 'msg="wrote file"'

# Without -debug, no log output.
exec sflit -source big2.go -sink small2.go -regex '^Filter'
! stderr 'msg='

-- big.go --
package p

func FilterA() {}
func Other()   {}
-- big2.go --
package p

func FilterA() {}
func Other()   {}
